pull.title: [SM100] Enable fp8 compute for prefill MLA
pull.body:
## Purpose

Adds a hook to run FP8 Prefill for Flashinfer Cutlass FMHA and TRTLLM Ragged Prefill Kernels for the Latent Attention models that use variable sequence length Prefill Kernels for SM100+.
This is triggered when `--kv-cache-dtype fp8` is enabled, similar to the decode path. 

Depends on https://github.com/flashinfer-ai/flashinfer/pull/2047/

This is step 0. To avoid the additional fp8 quant ops for q,k,v tensors, I plan on adding a rope + quant compilation pass that calls a custom kernel to fuse the operations.

## Test Plan
Accuracy evaluations with Math500 and MMLU Pro datasets.

## Test Result

GSM8k - Flashinfer Cutlass FMHA

```
export VLLM_USE_NCCL_SYMM_MEM=1
export NCCL_NVLS_ENABLE=1
export NCCL_CUMEM_ENABLE=1
export VLLM_ATTENTION_BACKEND=FLASHINFER_MLA
export VLLM_FLASHINFER_MOE_BACKEND=latency
export VLLM_USE_FLASHINFER_MOE_FP4=1

vllm serve /tmp/nvidia-DeepSeek-R1-FP4-v2  --kv-cache-dtype fp8 --tensor-parallel-size 1 --pipeline-parallel-size 1 --data-parallel-size 4 --enable-expert-parallel \
          --swap-space 16 --max-num-seqs 1024 --trust-remote-code --max-model-len 2176 --gpu-memory-utilization 0.9 --max-num-batched-tokens 8192 --no-enable-prefix-caching \
          --async-scheduling --compilation_config.pass_config.enable_fi_allreduce_fusion true --compilation_config.pass_config.enable_attn_fusion true \
          --compilation_config.max_cudagraph_capture_size 2048
```
Evals -
```
root@gb-nvl-081-compute05:/workspace/pm-vllm# python3 tests/evals/gsm8k/gsm8k_eval.py 
Running GSM8K evaluation: 1319 questions, 5-shot
Evaluating: 100%|██████████████████████████████████████████████████████| 1319/1319 [02:20<00:00,  9.37it/s]

Results:
Accuracy: 0.951
Invalid responses: 0.001
Total latency: 140.741 s
Questions per second: 9.372
Total output tokens: 125994
Output tokens per second: 895.219
```

Perf - https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/30746#issuecomment-3676301124

---

<summary> Essential Elements of an Effective PR Description Checklist </summary>

- [x] The purpose of the PR, such as "Fix some issue (link existing issues this PR will resolve)".
- [x] The test plan, such as providing test command.
- [ ] The test results, such as pasting the results comparison before and after, or e2e results
- [-] (Optional) The necessary documentation update, such as updating `supported_models.md` and `examples` for a new model.
- [-] (Optional) Release notes update. If your change is user facing, please update the release notes draft in the [Google Doc](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1YyVqrgX4gHTtrstbq8oWUImOyPCKSGnJ7xtTpmXzlRs/edit?tab=t.0).
</details>
